rule.instruction: A wall is divided into four horizontal parts. In the top row are four equal divisions, each with lines in a different direction. In the second row, six double combinations; in the third row, four triple combinations; in the bottom row, all four combinations superimposed.

designs.title: open, gentle
designs.intent: the tonal tableau open + gentle hand — lightest read (Klee #3, #9).

designs.title: very open (extreme)
designs.intent: extreme-light end — airy singles, faint hand (Klee #7).

designs.title: open, wild
designs.intent: open spacing but wild wandering line (Klee #3).

designs.title: dense, wildest
designs.intent: dense + wildest hand — the most organic (Klee #3).
